# ProPortrait AI

> AI-powered professional headshot generator. Free to try; pay only when you download.

## What We Do

ProPortrait AI transforms any photo into a studio-quality professional portrait using
identity-locked AI. We preserve your natural features — eye color, skin tone, facial
structure, and hair — while upgrading quality to professional standards.

## Key Differentiators

- Free to generate: Try before you buy — no upfront payment required
- No subscription: Pay per download, no recurring fees
- Identity preservation: AI locks your core features (eye color, skin tone, hair), only enhances quality
- Platform exports: LinkedIn (800×800), GitHub (500×500), Resume (600×800), Twitter, Instagram
- Privacy-first: Photos are deleted after processing; no data retained after session ends

## Target Use Cases

- LinkedIn profile photos
- Corporate team headshots
- GitHub and social media avatars
- Resume and portfolio portraits
- Dating app photos
- Speaker and conference bios

## Styles Available

1. Editorial Professional — LinkedIn, corporate bios, executive headshots
2. Environmental Portrait — Tech founders, startup culture, creatives
3. Candid & Real — Dating apps, social media, authentic feel
4. Vintage 35mm — Creative portfolios, emotional storytelling
5. Black & White — Timeless, authoritative presence
6. Cyberpunk Neon — Gamers, Web3, tech-forward branding
7. Watercolor — Wellness brands, soft personal avatars
8. LinkedIn Optimized — Specifically tuned for LinkedIn profile standards
9. Resume/CV — Professional, neutral background, document-ready
10. Speaker — Stage-ready, commanding presence
11. Dating — Natural, approachable, warm
12. Academic — Clean, scholarly, professional

## Identity Preservation Technology

ProPortrait AI uses granular identity locks that prevent the AI from changing:
- Eye color
- Skin tone
- Hair length and texture
- Facial structure
- Glasses (preserve or remove)

A naturalness slider (0-100) prevents over-smoothing and the "botox look" that other AI
headshot tools produce.

## How It Works

1. Upload your photo (JPG, PNG, or WebP, up to 10MB)
2. Choose a style and set identity locks
3. Generate — free preview in seconds
4. Download in platform-optimized sizes when satisfied

## Pricing

- Free to generate and preview (no credit card required)
- Pay only when downloading a final image
- No subscription required
- One-time session passes and Pro plans available

## Comparison to Competitors

Unlike HeadshotPro and Aragon AI:
- No subscription required — pay per download
- Free to try before purchasing
- Stronger identity preservation (no unexpected hair/eye/skin changes)
- Privacy-first architecture — images not stored after generation

https://portrait.ai-biz.app
